description: This file contains SCSS mixins for generating grid systems, including flexbox and CSS grid layouts, with support for responsive breakpoints, gutters, offsets, and column configurations.

methods.name: make-row
methods.description: Creates a flex container with wrapping and gutter margins for grid rows.

methods.name: make-col-ready
methods.description: Prepares a column with box-sizing, width, max-width, padding, and margin for grid layout.

methods.name: make-col
methods.description: Defines flex and width properties for a grid column based on size and total columns.

methods.name: make-col-auto
methods.description: Sets a column to auto width with flex and width properties.

methods.name: make-col-offset
methods.description: Applies margin-left offset to a column based on size and total columns.

methods.name: row-cols
methods.description: Defines a number of columns for immediate children of a row element.

methods.name: make-grid-columns
methods.description: Generates responsive grid classes for flexbox-based grid layout with support for breakpoints, gutters, and offsets.

methods.name: make-cssgrid
methods.description: Generates responsive CSS grid classes with support for breakpoints and column spans.
